title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 630.781 - Compensation of receiver
text:
630.781.  Compensation of receiver. — 1.  The court shall set the compensation of the receiver, which shall be considered a necessary expense of a receivership.
  2.  A receiver may be required by the court to post a bond, which shall be considered a necessary expense of the receivership.
(L. 1980 H.B. 1724)
